steps.t: Dwarves willing to share rumours can be found along the main passage and in the upper and lower wings of King Thorin's hall, in Erebor. Learn what you…
You should return to King Thorin in Erebor with news of the rumours you have heard.
Spall can be found in the great hall of Erebor. You should go inform Spall the Lore-master that King Thorin wishes to speak with him.
You should return to King Thorin in Erebor now that you have summoned Spall the Lore-master.
